ogTitle: West Ballina vs West Bungawalbin: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in West Ballina and West Bungawalbin.
heading: West Ballina vs West Bungawalbin — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between West Ballina, New South Wales and West Bungawalbin, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: West Ballina has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to West Bungawalbin (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is West Ballina or West Bungawalbin safer from flooding?
faq.answer: West Ballina has a flood risk score of 55/100, while West Bungawalbin scores 51/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: West Ballina scores 49/100 for bushfire risk. West Bungawalbin scores 55/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in West Ballina or West Bungawalbin?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. West Ballina has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
